analysis.reasoning: Core message: A Chinese diplomat in Europe thanks a compliment and states that China and Europe have difficulty understanding each other; diplomats should find common interests, bridge understanding gaps, and promote peace and cooperation; he will continue efforts. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not promoted; no criticism of the West, only acknowledgment of mutual misunderstanding. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Promoted implicitly: emphasizes promoting peace, cooperation, bridging gaps, and finding common interests—framing China's diplomatic role as cooperative and peace-seeking internationally. CH3 (epic history) – Not mentioned. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically) – Not addressed; no defense of political system or domestic values. CH5 (CCP governance succeeds) – Not discussed; no claims about domestic success or leadership. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet aligns with CH2.
